site.name: WebXC
site.tagline: Principal-led digital performance for established NZ businesses.
site.description: WebXC makes established businesses clearly understood, trusted, and citable across search and AI, by leading with business strategy and building a digital foundation the client fully owns.

/.title: WebXC | Digital Performance for Established NZ Businesses
/.description: Principal-led digital strategy for established NZ businesses. We close the gap between your real-world credibility and your digital presence.

/how-we-work/.title: How We Work | WebXC
/how-we-work/.description: Principal-led, three-step process. Free initial conversation, paid discovery and strategic review, then choose your path.

/website-design/.title: Website Design for Established NZ Businesses | WebXC
/website-design/.description: Principal-led website design for established NZ businesses. Strategy, content, SEO, and AI visibility, built around how your buyers actually search and decide.

/about/.title: About WebXC | Principal-Led Digital Performance | WebXC
/about/.description: WebXC is James Smith and Andrew Newman. Two principals, 40+ years combined experience. Every project is hands-on, strategic, and built for established NZ businesses.

/contact/.title: Get in Touch | WebXC
/contact/.description: Start a conversation with WebXC. Tell us about your situation and we'll respond within one business day.

/seo/.title: SEO for Established NZ Businesses | WebXC
/seo/.description: Search visibility built around buyer intent, content architecture, and technical clarity for established New Zealand businesses.

/geo/.title: Generative Engine Optimisation | AI Visibility for NZ Businesses | WebXC
/geo/.description: Make sure AI tools can understand, retrieve, and recommend your business with clear entity signals and structured content.

/cro/.title: Conversion Rate Optimisation for NZ Businesses | WebXC
/cro/.description: Turn more of the right visitors into enquiries through clearer messaging, stronger trust signals, and better conversion pathways.

/content-strategy/.title: Content Strategy for NZ Businesses | WebXC
/content-strategy/.description: Content structured around how buyers search, evaluate, and decide, so it performs for both people and machines.

/performance/.title: Performance Websites | Fast, Secure, AI-Ready | WebXC
/performance/.description: Fast, secure, technically strong websites built to support search visibility, AI accessibility, and long-term growth.

/content-management/.title: Content Management for Business Websites | WebXC
/content-management/.description: A CMS and content structure your team can actually use without breaking layouts, performance, or SEO foundations.

/insights/.title: Insights | Digital Strategy for NZ Businesses | WebXC
/insights/.description: Perspectives on digital strategy, AI visibility, SEO, and what it takes for established NZ businesses to compete online.

/insights/your-website-traffic-is-down/.title: Your Website Traffic Is Down, But That Might Not Be the Problem You Think It Is | WebXC
/insights/your-website-traffic-is-down/.description: Traffic decline is increasingly structural. The more important question is whether search engines and AI can still understand your business.

/insights/two-ways-ai-can-know-your-busi.title: The Two Ways AI Can Know About Your Business, and Why Most Businesses Are Invisible in Both | WebXC
/insights/two-ways-ai-can-know-your-busi.description: There are two fundamentally different ways AI systems can know about a business: inherent knowledge from training, and real-time retrieval.

/insights/content-is-cheap-what-does-aut.title: Content Is Cheap Now. So What Does Authority Actually Mean? | WebXC
/insights/content-is-cheap-what-does-aut.description: In a web flooded with plausible but empty content, authority comes from evidence, clarity, and signals machines can verify.
